name: GaugeFlow P3 independent held-out decoder qualification v1
purpose: Replace the non-independent InN/BN endpoint-ID decoration panel with one single-run qualification of the v3 bounded exact-assignment decoder on held-out formula and crystallographic-prototype groups. This is a decoder qualification, not a composition-generator, tensor-conditioned, or GaugeFlow generation claim.

preconditions.data_activation: formula joins, StructureMatcher near-duplicate audit, response strata and hashes must pass before selection
preconditions.selection_manifest: artifacts/gate_p3_independent_decoder_qualification_v1/panel_manifest.json must be generated and committed before the one allowed run

selection.eligibility: 2--8 sites, 2--4 active elements, finite full-O(3)-compatible target cache; tensor value is not supplied to the decoder
selection.prototype_key: (space-group number, sorted unlabeled Wyckoff multiplicities, site count, active-element count)
selection.holdout_rule: no reduced formula or prototype key may cross train/validation/test; every held-out structure must also be StructureMatcher-screened against the training set for near duplicates
selection.selection_output: material IDs, formulas, prototype keys, source hashes, exclusions and near-duplicate result are frozen in the manifest

decoder.inputs: all-mask tokens and periodic geometry only; no endpoint ID, target tensor, target composition encoder input, CIF row index, target species mapping, target metadata or target stabilizer
decoder.assignment_law: exact count-constrained categorical quotient with state-dependent proper-SO(3) residual group; true counts only define evaluation/training support for this decoder qualification

training_and_evaluation.batching: fixed pre-registered graph batch schedule; no adaptive extension
training_and_evaluation.evaluation: all held-out validation/test graphs with species-aware periodic StructureMatcher, quotient metrics, complete assignment-law node-relabeling and sampled categorical assignments

required_reports: per-material quotient NLL and target quotient probability
all three seed rows without selection
decision_rule: A pass qualifies only the geometry-only, supplied-count exact assignment decoder on this independently held-out panel. It does not qualify generated composition, the joint generator, tensor-conditioned GaugeFlow, real piezo v2, an oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
